title: Learn English Chunks
prompt: Practice using English chunks by repeating and creating sentences with them.
hint: Focus on memorizing whole phrases (chunks) instead of individual words to speak more naturally.
sample:
Chunk: 'I was wondering if'
Use it to ask for a favor politely.
Example: 'I was wondering if you could help me.'

ja.prompt: 英語のチャンクを練習し、それらを使って文章を作りましょう。
ja.hint: 単語単位ではなく、フレーズ全体（チャンク）を覚えることで、より自然に話せます。
ja.sample:
チャンク: 'I was wondering if'
丁寧にお願いをするときに使います。
例: 'I was wondering if you could help me.'

zh.prompt: 練習使用英語片語（chunks），重複並造句。
zh.hint: 專注記憶整句片語，而非單字，讓你說話更自然。
zh.sample:
片語：'I was wondering if'
用來禮貌地請求幫忙。
例句：'I was wondering if you could help me.'

title: Chunk: To Make a Long Story Short
prompt: Use the chunk 'to make a long story short' to summarize a story quickly.
hint: Say this phrase before giving a brief conclusion or summary.
sample: To make a long story short, we missed the train but caught the next one.

ja.prompt: 'to make a long story short' というチャンクを使って、話を手短にまとめましょう。
ja.hint: 話の結論や要約を言う前に使います。
ja.sample: To make a long story short, we missed the train but caught the next one.

zh.prompt: 使用片語 'to make a long story short' 來快速總結故事。
zh.hint: 在給出簡短結論或摘要前說這句話。
zh.sample: To make a long story short, we missed the train but caught the next one.

title: Chunk: I'm Looking Forward To
prompt: Practice using 'I'm looking forward to' to express excitement about the future.
hint: Use this phrase before mentioning an event or time you are excited about.
sample: I'm looking forward to the weekend.

ja.prompt: 'I'm looking forward to' を使って、未来の楽しみを表現しましょう。
ja.hint: 楽しみにしているイベントや時間の前に使います。
ja.sample: I'm looking forward to the weekend.

zh.prompt: 練習使用 'I'm looking forward to' 表達對未來的期待。
zh.hint: 在提到你期待的事件或時間前使用這句話。
zh.sample: I'm looking forward to the weekend.

title: Chunk: It Has Nothing to Do With
prompt: Use 'It has nothing to do with' to say two things are not connected.
hint: Use this phrase to explain that something is unrelated to another thing.
sample: It has nothing to do with you.

ja.prompt: 'It has nothing to do with' を使って、二つのことが関係ないことを伝えましょう。
ja.hint: 何かが別のことと無関係であることを説明するときに使います。
ja.sample: It has nothing to do with you.

zh.prompt: 使用 'It has nothing to do with' 表示兩件事無關。
zh.hint: 用這句話說明某事與另一事無關。
zh.sample: It has nothing to do with you.

title: Chunk: By the Way
prompt: Practice using 'By the way' to change the topic in conversation.
hint: Use this phrase when you want to introduce a new subject.
sample: By the way, how is your family?

ja.prompt: 'By the way' を使って、会話の話題を変えましょう。
ja.hint: 新しい話題を紹介したいときに使います。
ja.sample: By the way, how is your family?

zh.prompt: 練習使用 'By the way' 來轉換談話主題。
zh.hint: 當你想介紹新話題時使用這句話。
zh.sample: By the way, how is your family?
